positive: A symmetrical, central composition of ethereal, bioluminescent flora entwined with stylized astronomical elements. Focus on deep sapphire and vibrant emerald greens, contrasted against a subtle, pale nebula background. The main subject is a cascade of glowing, abstract cosmic vines and floating celestial mandalas, rendered with sharp, graphic outlines and high contrast. Emphasize clean silhouettes and intricate, repeating patterns suitable for seamless print design. Cinematic lighting, minimalist graphic novel aesthetic, vector illustration quality, high definition.
